\begin{table}[t]
  \centering
  \caption{Data sources: census image counts (the pipeline re-counts on
    ingest), licenses, and roles (T2/T6/T10). The test source is the
    leave-one-source-out TEST-1 holdout: ingested, never trained on.
    The qa-ref source is used only as an IoU cross-check reference for
    auto-box QA (T3).}
  \label{tab:dataset-licenses}
  \small
  \begin{tabular}{lrllp{5.2cm}}
    \toprule
    Source & Images & License & Role & Attribution \\
    \midrule
    trashnet & 2{,}527 & MIT & train & Gary Thung and Mindy Yang, TrashNet (github.com/garythung/trashnet), 2,527 images at 512x384, single object on white posterboard \\
    drinking-waste & 4{,}828 & CC0-1.0 & train & Arkadiy Serezhkin, Drinking Waste Classification (kaggle.com/datasets/arkadiyhacks/drinking-waste-classification), 4,828 images of drink containers with YOLO boxes, UCL final-year project \\
    garbage-detection & 10{,}464 & CC BY 4.0 & train & Viswa Prakash, Garbage Detection - 6 Waste Categories (kaggle.com/datasets/viswaprakash1990/garbage-detection), Kaggle mirror of Roboflow material-identification/garbage-classification-3 v2, 10,464 detection images with YOLO boxes \\
    alistairking-household & 15{,}000 & MIT & train & Alistair King, Recyclable and Household Waste Classification (kaggle.com/datasets/alistairking/recyclable-and-household-waste-classification), 15,000 images at 256x256 across 30 categories, studio (default) and real\_world splits of 250 images each \\
    realwaste & 4{,}752 & CC BY 4.0 & test & Sam Single, Saeid Iranmanesh, and Raad Raad, RealWaste (UCI Machine Learning Repository, dataset 908), 4,752 images at 524x524 of waste items at the point of landfill reception, 9 material labels \\
    trashnet-bbox (Polygence) & 2{,}524 & CC BY 4.0 & qa-ref & Polygence, human-annotated TrashNet bounding boxes (Roboflow Universe), IoU cross-check reference for auto-boxing QA only (T3) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[t]
  \centering
  \caption{Sources surveyed by the dataset census and excluded, with
    reasons (T10).}
  \label{tab:excluded-sources}
  \small
  \begin{tabular}{lp{8.2cm}}
    \toprule
    Source & Exclusion reason \\
    \midrule
    WaDaBa & contract-gated access; plastics-only and PET-dominated \\
    mostafaabla/garbage-classification & ODbL license; TrashNet-repack lineage (F20) \\
    sumn2u/garbage-classification-v2 & license ambiguity (MIT page vs CC BY 4.0 paper) and conflicting published counts \\
    ZeroWaste & CC BY-NC (non-commercial) license \\
    TACO & cluttered-scene domain mismatch (F19); per-image Flickr licenses \\
    CompostNet & no license published \\
    techsash/waste-classification, Fruits-360 & CC BY-SA; off-domain; held as organic reserve only (F21) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
